content: Sampe sekarang gak ngerti cara main ultra. Punya clementine tapi rasa chaos

mekanik realmnya ga terlalu sulit sih, basicnya ada 4:
- khusus char ultra, kartu pertama yg dimainin (setiap turn) bakal ada efek tambahan
- for all realm, kartu pertama yg dimainin bakal disimpen ke temporary deck gitu (lupa namanya)
- temporary deck bisa diclick, nanti kartu yg paling kiri (dari temporary deck) bakal dihapus, tapi kita +1 arith dan draw 1 card
- kalau temporary deck udah keisi 5 kartu, nanti kita masuk ke extra turn, draw 5 kartu tersebut
yg agak sulit mekanik characternya paling...
Kalau dijadiin dps, iya, kalau buat support biasa engga
Horla tergantung km mau nyeranh atau ga
Castor pinter main rouse sama seberapa banya Corrosiom
Clem justru paling gampang wkwkq. Makanya gw sering masukin dia bareng 3 chaos atau 3 aqueros (gak ada support bagus selain dia)

Masih, intinya mainin cardnya di awal, efeknya bakal double (seinget ku)
Absolutely, padahal belum kebuka covenant ring. Make covenant yang kasih 1 strike di turn awal aja udah pedes banget damage nya
Aku gak punya wod clem sih jadi gak tau brp damage nya pake wod dia. Tapi pake wod lotan tembus 10k sekali exalt kalau crit

I hate Pandia so much in phantasmal i hate her i hate her. I procced a once in a lifetime death res three times in a row from her multihit and got the opportunity to one shot her, but i accidently killed myself with a symptom card and now no matter how many times I retry that death res miracle never happens again so i ended up using a fcing gnosis and one shotted her aas. I gave Pandia a shi ton of damage multiplier for more points but now that I gnosisd I got 20% deducted and I still beat my stupid highscore
